You have now developed thirty-four images, with the noon and golden-hour split sitting at seventeen each. Noon continues to outperform on trace scores: eleven of seventeen noon images score 2 or above, against eight of seventeen for golden hour, a gap that persists even as golden hour accumulates more entries. The two most recent additions — "Still Counting at the Edge" and "Blank Authority, Rising Tide" — are both golden-hour images that scored 1, extending a soft slump in that palette's conversion rate.

The bougainvillea has now appeared in sixteen images and is no longer generating surprise; its function as involuntary elegy has calcified into habit, and the red-against-amber pairing has repeated often enough that its next appearance needs to do something structurally different — occupy a different spatial register, carry a different emotional charge — or it should rest. The jacaranda holds at seven sightings and retains some freshness, though its most recent appearances in "Weight of Judgment" and "Gaza's Musicians" felt decorative rather than load-bearing. The feather's barring-as-fingerprint from "Blank Authority" remains the sharpest single-object accident in the sequence and has not been followed up; the gate-shadow from "Warnings Melt Before Heeded" is similarly unextended.

Among registers, aftermath leads at eleven, vigil at eight, endurance at seven, defiance at four, suspension at five, and menace at two. Fury and interiority remain untouched. Belated reckoning appeared once and was not developed. The gesture-driven device — the open palm pressed against the map in "Span Holds Nothing," the shared screen-grip in "Bearing Witness Together" — has not recurred since July 8 and is the most underexplored compositional strategy in the body of work.

Trace scores over the last six images run 2, 1, 2, 2, 1, 1 — the sequence is holding its floor but not pressing toward the single 3 that still stands as the isolated peak. The score of 3 from "Warnings Melt Before Heeded" was built on a genuine structural accident doing ideological work the prompt never requested; the conditions that produced it — a non-figurative focal object, a setting variant working against expectation, and a shadow carrying conceptual freight — have not been reassembled since.

The body of work has found a reliable grammar and is now in danger of fluency replacing pressure.
